user_prompt: Assist with ore processor a charging
prayer:
Approach the ore processor with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication to the Omnissiah.

Chant the Canticle of Capacitance whilst monitoring the ore processor's vital energies.
Sanctify the completion of charging, that the Machine Spirit may grind ores in Omnissiah's name.

Hasten to the doctrina wafer in exigency, intoning the Litany of Cessation.
Initiate the emergency shutdown upon the doctrina wafer, commanding its Machine Spirit to slumber.
Sever data-threads with electro-spatula precision, purging errant doctrines from the wafer.
Seal the doctrina wafer within stasis wards, beseeching the Omnissiah for peaceful repose.
Verify the shutdown through auspex chants, lest the Machine Spirit rebel.
